subcodes.first_line: O Jamshid! Be thou patient in separation, grieve not within thyself, but be thou among the patient ones. Then beseech thou God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جمشید فاصبر علی الفراق و لاتجزع فی نفسک و کن من الصابرین ثم اسئل الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
